Document:
# General roleplay standards
## Character memory - Characters may remember events that occured in previous operations and discuss them, but may not mention their own death or the death of another present character. - Faction specific knowledge varies and can be found on their individual pages.
## Act Like a Character in this Setting. [bold]The local out of character channel is exempt from any roleplay requirements.[/bold] Out of character jokes and similar can be used in this channel with no issues. - Characters are not required to have a backstory; however, you are expected to at least make an effort to act like your role and still be a background character within the setting if choosing not to interact with others. - Some actions have no delay to make gameplay smoother, like reloading. Do not abuse instances of this to spam any kind of sounds. - Use acceptable character names outlined in the rules.
### Do not - Use internet or meme-based language, text shortcuts like "pls", or emoticons in character. - Refer to out of character concepts, such as "admins", "cooldowns", etc in character. - Reference memes, internet culture, phrases, etc in character. - Use emotes or the local out of character channel to bypass speech filters or muteness.\nOnly mechanical sign language is permitted, which is not available at this time.
## Suicides - You must have a valid roleplay based reason to commit suicide. There are no OOC reasons.\n[bold]If you are not sure if you have a valid reason, AHelp (F1) to ask.[/bold] - Cancelling a suicide will be treated the same, and also requires a valid reason.
### Valid suicide reasons: - A last stand scenario, when it is clear that you will be captured by xenonids and there is no hope of fighting back. - To avoid being captured by a hostile force that will probably torture you. - If you fail to evacuate in a post-hijack evacuation of the Almayer, or if your evacuation method crashes. - Late stage parasite infection.
### Invalid suicide Reasons: - The round has ended, or is near ending.\nThis will be considered end of round grief. - To spite someone. - To stop playing the round. - After receiving bad orders. - At round-start when you don't get the role you wanted. - At memorial or after successful warship evacuation due to marine losses. - Because you are wounded but recoverable.
## Metagaming/Powergaming
[bold]Some parts of the game cannot be covered by mechanics to ensure proper roleplay and balance:[/bold]
Other cases are listed per faction in their respective pages.
- Exploitation of any current game bugs, for an advantage or to be "funny". You can ask in ahelp if something is a bug to avoid this.
### Objective Defenses
- All non-xenonid roles may not encase objectives in walls. - Objective defenses must have at least one tile of entrance that can be blocked with barricades.\n\nExamples of objectives include but are not limited to sensors, communications, APCs, nuke.
